keyEvents.text: Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 0, El Salvador 1. Jairo Henríquez (El Salvador) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Rafael Tejada.
Adan Clímaco (El Salvador) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1, El Salvador 1. Oalex Anderson (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Najima Burgin with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, El Salvador. Pablo Punyed replaces Adan Clímaco.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Kennijah Joseph replaces Sherwyn Alexander.
Substitution, El Salvador. Darwin Cerén replaces Melvin Cartagena.
Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1, El Salvador 2. Rafael Tejada (El Salvador) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Francis Castillo-Orellana.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Steven Pierre replaces Kirtney Franklyn.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Gavin Browne replaces Najima Burgin.
Substitution, El Salvador. Kevin Santamaría replaces Rafael Tejada.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Jequan Adams replaces Kevin Francis.
Substitution, St. Vincent and the Grenadines. Aaron Jackson replaces Saviola Blake.
Substitution, El Salvador. Nelson Bonilla replaces Jairo Henríquez.
Substitution, El Salvador. Joaquín Rivas replaces Francis Castillo-Orellana.
Kennijah Joseph (St. Vincent and the Grenadines) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1, El Salvador 3. Nelson Bonilla (El Salvador) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Nelson Flores with a cross.
Second Half ends, St. Vincent and the Grenadines 1, El Salvador 3.
